text_original: its a very easy to use, app memory is great, I love it
text_zh: 它非常易于使用，应用内存占用很小，我很喜欢它。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear that you find Fantasia easy to use and that our memory feature is hitting the mark for you. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going! We will keep working hard to create even more magical memories for you. If you ever need help, email support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您觉得 Fantasia 易于使用，且我们的记忆功能深得您心，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力！我们将继续努力，为您创造更多奇妙的回忆。如果您需要任何帮助，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。
